change_comments.message:
Startup of sdnc pod fails due to Memory limits.
I saw in lens during startup the memory consumption of 7,132G for the sdnc container.
I was able to fix it by setting the memory like this:
```
    javaOptions:
      maxGCPauseMillis: 100
      parallelGCThreads : 3
      numberGCLogFiles: 10
      minMemory: 1028m
      maxMemory: 6144m
      gcLogOptions: ""

```
Additionally, could you please increase the SDNC Chart.yaml version (e.g. 15.1.0)

Dan, you did override all other changes (Chart.yaml, config files) of Patchset 11.
Could you please include them again...

Sorry, yes I did override the other changes.  I just cherry picked patchset 11 to restore them and reapplied my version changes which looks like it did the trick (I compared patchset 11 and 13 and saw only my version changes)
